rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex syntax
Use only visible identifiers in guarantees
Ensure guarantees relate outputs to inputs
Use AGREE logical operators for branching logic
generic_rules: Repair only the diagnostic issue without changing unrelated architecture
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions and guarantees
Place component type contracts in component type annexes
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use AGREE logical operators such as `and`, `or`, `not(...)`, and implication `=>`
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not add architecture to fix AGREE type errors; fix the root reference or remove the clause
